Description
com.example._0tazo.controller
 
com.example._0tazo.model
 
  • Classes in com.example._0tazo.model used by com.example._0tazo.controller
    Class
    Description
    Card
    Represents a single playing card with a number, suit, face direction, and back color.
    Game
    Orchestrates the Cincuentazo game: manages player order, turn progression, player elimination, and the win condition.
    IPlayer
    Contract that every player in the Cincuentazo game must fulfill, regardless of whether they are human or computer-controlled.
  • Classes in com.example._0tazo.model used by com.example._0tazo.model
    Class
    Description
    AbstractPlayer
    Abstract base implementation of IPlayer that manages the shared state and logic common to all player types in the Cincuentazo game.
    Card
    Represents a single playing card with a number, suit, face direction, and back color.
    Deck
    Represents a double standard deck of 104 playing cards, composed of two complete 52-card sets â€” one with red backs and one with blue backs.
    Game
    Orchestrates the Cincuentazo game: manages player order, turn progression, player elimination, and the win condition.
    IPlayer
    Contract that every player in the Cincuentazo game must fulfill, regardless of whether they are human or computer-controlled.
    Table
    Represents the physical table in the Cincuentazo game.
